summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Clínica Veterinaria Dra. Carvajal / Regeneravet landing page. All critical functionalities working correctly including language toggle, WhatsApp CTAs, gallery with lightbox, trust ratings, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor DOM attachment error after page reload during language switching
ui_bugs.impact: Does not affect functionality, language persistence works correctly

passed_tests: Hero section loads with Spanish content by default
Language toggle (ES/EN) works and persists via localStorage
All primary CTA buttons link to correct Nexo Sites WhatsApp (+506 8993 9071)
Business contact info is display-only (phone +506 2653 0798, WhatsApp +506 8849 2647)
Services section shows all 7 services including Regeneravet treatments
Gallery section with 6 images and functional lightbox
Trust section shows correct ratings (4.0★ Google, 100% Facebook)
Pricing section with high contrast dark green background and white text
Footer displays correct business name and Nexo Sites attribution
Sticky WhatsApp button visible and properly positioned on mobile
Mobile responsive design with appropriate layouts
All interactive elements have proper data-testids
